commitSubjects: fix: stabilize sidebar resize drag coverage (#446)
perf: cap desktop feed text projection (#444)
perf: patch hot feed state mutations (#442)
perf: move feed priority sorting off the render path
perf: contain feed card layout work (#437)
fix: use AppKit activation for desktop launch (#436)
fix: restore desktop main window activation (#434)

fixes: Sidebar resize drag coverage are now more stable
AppKit activation for desktop launch now uses the correct path
Startup now retries the native show path and records activation probe results
Feed cards now isolate layout and paint work so long content does less damage while scrolling
Feed resizing now observes the active scroll container without reconnecting on every render
Read-on-scroll tracking now skips a per-row diagnostic event on the active scroll path
Feed priority ordering now runs in the Automerge workers instead of the normal render path
The feed search hook now reuses identical filter results across the feed, header, and command search callers
The normal feed path now skips building the search item map when the search box is empty
Feed bulk action counts now share one cached pass across header and jump controls
Local snapshot cleanup now prunes orphaned snapshot binaries and contact metadata
Startup now prunes stale snapshot binaries when local snapshots are listed
Saved toggles plus bulk read and archive actions now update through item patches instead of full document hydration

releaseBody:
(AI Generated).

## Freed v26.5.510-dev

Startup repair ships

### Fixes

- Sidebar resize drag coverage are now more stable
- AppKit activation for desktop launch now uses the correct path
- Strengthen desktop native activation
- Desktop main window activation restored
- Startup now retries the native show path and records activation probe results
- Feed cards now isolate layout and paint work so long content does less damage while scrolling
- Feed resizing now observes the active scroll container without reconnecting on every render
- Read-on-scroll tracking now skips a per-row diagnostic event on the active scroll path
- Feed priority ordering now runs in the Automerge workers instead of the normal render path
- The feed search hook now reuses identical filter results across the feed, header, and command search callers
- The normal feed path now skips building the search item map when the search box is empty
- Feed bulk action counts now share one cached pass across header and jump controls
- Local snapshot cleanup now prunes orphaned snapshot binaries and contact metadata
- Startup now prunes stale snapshot binaries when local snapshots are listed
- Saved toggles plus bulk read and archive actions now update through item patches instead of full document hydration

### Follow-ups

- Cap desktop feed text projection
- Skip no-op startup hydration
- Patch hot feed state mutations
- Cache feed action scopes

### Downloads

**macOS:** `.dmg` (Apple Silicon or Intel, signed + notarized)  
**Windows:** `.exe` (NSIS installer)  
**Linux:** `.AppImage`  

> macOS downloads are signed and notarized for normal Gatekeeper installation.
